name: 05_metrics_contract_transport_dev_transport_fndc
statement:
SELECT
  'contract' AS table_family,
  'transport_dev' AS catalog_name,
  'transport_fndc' AS schema_name,
  'uvw_c_surface' AS table_name,
  'VIEW' AS table_type,
  COUNT(*) AS row_count,
  COUNT(*) > 0 AS has_rows,
  GREATEST(MAX(CASE WHEN try_cast(`start_m` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`start_m` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MAX(CASE WHEN try_cast(`start_name` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`start_name` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MAX(CASE WHEN try_cast(`gps_date` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`gps_date` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MAX(CASE WHEN try_cast(`surface_date` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`surface_date` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MAX(CASE WHEN try_cast(`removed_date` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`removed_date` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MAX(CASE WHEN try_cast(`condition_date` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`condition_date` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MAX(CASE WHEN try_cast(`valuation_date` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`valuation_date` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MAX(CASE WHEN try_cast(`added_on` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`added_on` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MAX(CASE WHEN try_cast(`chgd_on` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`chgd_on` AS TIMESTAMP) END)) AS latest_observed_ts,
  LEAST(MIN(CASE WHEN try_cast(`start_m` AS TIMESTAMP) >= TIMESTAMP '1900-01-01 00:00:00' AND try_cast(`start_m` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`start_m` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MIN(CASE WHEN try_cast(`start_name` AS TIMESTAMP) >= TIMESTAMP '1900-01-01 00:00:00' AND try_cast(`start_name` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`start_name` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MIN(CASE WHEN try_cast(`gps_date` AS TIMESTAMP) >= TIMESTAMP '1900-01-01 00:00:00' AND try_cast(`gps_date` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`gps_date` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MIN(CASE WHEN try_cast(`surface_date` AS TIMESTAMP) >= TIMESTAMP '1900-01-01 00:00:00' AND try_cast(`surface_date` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`surface_date` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MIN(CASE WHEN try_cast(`removed_date` AS TIMESTAMP) >= TIMESTAMP '1900-01-01 00:00:00' AND try_cast(`removed_date` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`removed_date` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MIN(CASE WHEN try_cast(`condition_date` AS TIMESTAMP) >= TIMESTAMP '1900-01-01 00:00:00' AND try_cast(`condition_date` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`condition_date` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MIN(CASE WHEN try_cast(`valuation_date` AS TIMESTAMP) >= TIMESTAMP '1900-01-01 00:00:00' AND try_cast(`valuation_date` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`valuation_date` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MIN(CASE WHEN try_cast(`added_on` AS TIMESTAMP) >= TIMESTAMP '1900-01-01 00:00:00' AND try_cast(`added_on` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`added_on` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MIN(CASE WHEN try_cast(`chgd_on` AS TIMESTAMP) >= TIMESTAMP '1900-01-01 00:00:00' AND try_cast(`chgd_on` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`chgd_on` AS TIMESTAMP) END)) AS earliest_observed_ts,
  'start_m|start_name|gps_date|surface_date|removed_date|condition_date|valuation_date|added_on|chgd_on' AS freshness_columns
FROM `transport_dev`.`transport_fndc`.`uvw_c_surface`
UNION ALL

MIN(CASE WHEN try_cast(`valuation_date` AS TIMESTAMP) >= TIMESTAMP '1900-01-01 00:00:00' AND try_cast(`valuation_date` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`valuation_date` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MIN(CASE WHEN try_cast(`collect_date` AS TIMESTAMP) >= TIMESTAMP '1900-01-01 00:00:00' AND try_cast(`collect_date` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() +   COUNT(*) > 0 AS has_rows,
  GREATEST(MAX(CASE WHEN try_cast(`time` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`time` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MAX(CASE WHEN try_cast(`loaded_at` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`loaded_at` AS TIMESTAMP) END)) AS latest_observed_ts,
  LEAST(MIN(CASE WHEN try_cast(`time` AS TIMESTAMP) >= TIMESTAMP '1900-01-01 00:00:00' AND try_cast(`time` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`time` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MIN(CASE WHEN try_cast(`loaded_at` AS TIMESTAMP) >= TIMESTAMP '1900-01-01 00:00:00' AND try_cast(`loaded_at` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`loaded_at` AS TIMESTAMP) END)) AS earliest_observed_ts,
  'time|loaded_at' AS freshness_columns
FROM `transport_dev`.`transport_fndc`.`weather_hourly_forecast`
